title: calamagrostis benthamiana
intro: Calamagrostis benthamiana, also known as Bentham's bent grass, is a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and Tibet. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Calamagrostis benthamiana include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and improve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
